ddls:
CREATE TABLE "race_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the race event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the race event took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue hosting the event */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., road, mountain, etc.) */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "race_category" TEXT /* Category of the race (e.g., professional, amateur, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the participant belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the participant in the race */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the participant */,
  "medical_clearance" INTEGER /* Medical clearance status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "overall_position" INTEGER /* Overall position of the participant in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Total time taken by the participant */,
  "lap_1" TEXT /* Time taken in lap 1 */,
  "lap_2" TEXT /* Time taken in lap 2 */,
  "lap_3" TEXT /* Time taken in lap 3 */,
  "lap_4" TEXT /* Time taken in lap 4 */,
  "carried_points" INTEGER /* Points carried over from previous races */,
  "scored_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the current race */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the participant */,
  "dnf" INTEGER /* Did not finish (DNF) status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES race_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization the organizer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the category */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., cash, in-kind, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES race_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_event_venues" (
  "event_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-venue association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "setup_date" TEXT /* Date of setup for the event */,
  "teardown_date" TEXT /* Date of teardown for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_event_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_event_venues_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES race_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_medical" (
  "medical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant's medical record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the participant */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies the participant has */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the participant */,
  "medical_certificate" INTEGER /* Medical certificate status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_medical_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., judge, marshal, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_event_officials" (
  "event_official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-official association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment for the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_event_officials_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES race_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_event_officials_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES race_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, organizer, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
